title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 0–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So that's that floating restaurant, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not much to look at, is it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sigh... just as I thought. Low-level dishes, the lot of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To be honest, a place like this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: shouldn't even call itself a restau- rant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an insult to the world of gourmet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whaaa?! the hell's with that woman?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, that is a woman, right? A human, right? She looks like a bloody sea king!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Yes, you, waiter! Come here!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 15 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
